item.name: Parade Chocobo Whistle
item.description: A small hand-carved whistle that emits a unique, high-pitched tone discernible only by a chocobo trained from birth to recognize and respond to the sound. Use to summon your parade chocobo.

mount.name: Parade Chocobo
mount.action: Summon forth your parade chocobo who, by the looks of him, has not marched in many parades.
mount.description: Originally purchased by the Adventurers' Guild for use in festival parades, this portly steed quickly wore out his welcome by devouring a moon's worth of fodder in a single turn of the sun. Unable to pay the price of upkeep, the guild passed the reins to someone more “commendable.”
mount.tooltip:
I'll be at the parade with
whomever else I can drag along.
- Botulf
